description.ko: 소리의 주파수가 액체 표면을 구조화되고 리드미컬한 빛의 풍경으로 변모시키는 과정을 시각화한 작품입니다.
description.en: A visual representation of sound frequencies transforming a liquid surface into a structured, rhythmic landscape of light.

prompt: An abstract 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Kinetic Symphony.' A liquid mercury surface rippling into violent geometric peaks of #4169E1 royal blue and #FF4500 orange. Intricate #FFD700 golden particles and #32CD32 lime green frequency lines react to invisible audio oscillations in a dark obsidian void. High-speed motion blur, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, capturing the visual consonance and rhythmic energy of a powerful sound wave.
